word: G1339 - διΐστημι - diḯstēmi - dee-is'-tay-mee - Go further

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to place separately, to put asunder, to disjoin
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1223 and G2476; to stand apart, that is, (reflexively) to remove, intervene: - go further, be parted, after the space of.
